full_text:
Sun Chen (Zitong) 孫綝 (子通)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Chen (孫綝), styledZitong (子通). Executed a number of Wu officials and abused his authority, deposed Sun Liang. Sun Chen was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Chen lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
